tech_news.title: Valve Confirms Steam Machine Will Cost Over $1,000. Here's How to Buy One - PCMag
tech_news.description: The 512GB version will cost $1,049, while the 2TB version is $1,349. You can sign up now to join a waiting list, with orders opening up next week.
